creator: cem@freebsd.org
text: ntfs-3g appears to use the highlevel API only.  It seems like attribute caching is enabled or disabled with a compile-time option ("CACHEING" macro) based on some platform-specific definitions, and nothing else explicitly configures it.  The values used are either 0.0, 1.0, or 10.0.  So, I'm still leaning towards 0 = do not cache, non-zero = cache indefinitely.
